parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor Actor
entity EventBus

box "Service Orchestrator" #8fce8f
boundary so
end box

box "Software Defined Infrastructure" #cccc8f
participant storageresource
end box

Actor -> so : Version Application Stack
so -> storageresource : list (name: hello,file: ./templates/world.yml)
storageresource --> EventBus : data.list
so -> storageresource : list (name: hello,file: ./templates/world.yml)
storageresource --> EventBus : data.list

@enduml
```
